mapper.select: SELECT mapp.TOBE_INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , mapp.ASI_UTLINSTT_ID , mapp.ASI_INVMAPLC_MNNO , mapp.ENPR_INFO_TRCT_BASE_YN , mapp.RGSN_USER_ID , mapp.RGSN_TS , mapp.AMNN_USER_ID , mapp.AMNN_TS , pgsg.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_TRCT_R mapp LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ORDER BY RGSN_TS DESC) AS RNK , RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R ) WHERE RNK = 1 ) pgsg ON mapp.TOBE_INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = pgsg.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID WHERE mapp.ASI_UTLINSTT_ID = #{asiUtlinsttId} AND mapp.ASI_INVMAPLC_MNNO = #{asiInvmaplcMnno}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , AMNN_TS = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE 1=1 AND FILE_ID IN ( SELECT ANNC_DAT_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M WHERE INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = #{invmExntRqstId} UNION ALL SELECT ADDT_DOC_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M WHERE INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = #{invmExntRqstId} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
m101.INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO , m101.USIS_ID
, m101.INVM_RQST_BZN , m101.USER_ID , m101.INVM_RQST_ENPR_NM , m101.ENIN_INRD_CON , m101.BIZ_FILD_CON , m101.UTLZ_TCHN_CON , m101.HMPG_ADR , m101.ALL_HOLD_STCK_CNT , m101.ALL_STCK_ISS_AMT , m101.EMP_CNT , m101.MNFR_BSNS_NM , m101.MNFR_BSNS_INRD_CON , m101.IMG_NO , m101.HOPE_INVM_STG_ID , m101.HOPE_INVM_ENMT_AMT , m101.IRRS_DAT_MNGM_NO , m101.ETC_DAT_MNGM_NO , m101.PGRS_STTS_DCD , m101.EXNT_RSLT_CD , m101.EXNT_OPNN_CON , m101.EXNT_TS , m101.EXNT_RJCN_STTS_CD , m101.EXNT_RJCN_CON
, m101.RGSR_ID , m101.RGSN_TS , m101.SYS_LSMD_ID , m101.SYS_LSMD_TS
, CAST(m101.RGSN_TS AS TIMESTAMP) AS CAST_RGSN_TS , CAST(m101.SYS_LSMD_TS AS TIMESTAMP) AS CAST_SYS_LSMD_TS
, m101.BRCD , m101.EMN , m101.EMM , m101.TCB_TCHN_GRD , m101.INCF_CD1 , m101.INCF_CD2 , m101.INCF_CD3
, CASE WHEN TRIM(eim.CMPNY_LOGO_IMAGE_FILE) IS NULL THEN eim.CMPNY_LOGO_BASS_IMAGE_FILE ELSE eim.CMPNY_LOGO_IMAGE_FILE END AS USIS_LOGO_FILE_ID
, h401.INVM_APLC_PSST_SRN AS H401_INVM_APLC_PSST_SRN , h401.USIS_ID AS H401_USIS_ID , h401.INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO AS H401_INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO
, h401.PGRS_CON AS H401_PGRS_CON , h401.PGRS_STTS_CD AS H401_PGRS_STTS_CD
, h401.RGSR_ID AS H401_RGSR_ID , h401.RGSN_TS AS H401_RGSN_TS , h401.SYS_LSMD_ID AS H401_SYS_LSMD_ID , h401.SYS_LSMD_TS AS H401_SYS_LSMD_TS
, CAST(h401.RGSN_TS AS TIMESTAMP) AS H401_CAST_RGSN_TS , CAST(h401.SYS_LSMD_TS AS TIMESTAMP) AS H401_CAST_SYS_LSMD_TS
FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RGSN_TS ASC) AS rnum, m101.* FROM TB_BOX_IVT101M m101 ORDER BY m101.RGSN_TS ) WHERE 1=1
AND (#{startRange} <= rnum AND rnum <= #{endRange})
) m101
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT401H h401 ON (h401.INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO = m101.INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO AND h401.USIS_ID = m101.USIS_ID) LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim ON m101.USIS_ID = eim.UTLINSTT_ID
ORDER BY
CAST_RGSN_TS ASC, h401.INVM_APLC_PSST_SRN ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT EXNT_INFO_SRN , INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO , USIS_ID , INVM_USIS_ID , APLC_AMT , APLC_TS , PGRS_STTS_CD , EXNT_FNSG_TS , RGSR_ID , RGSN_TS , SYS_LSMD_ID , SYS_LSMD_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT301M WHERE INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO = #{invmAplcMngmNo} AND USIS_ID = {usisId}
ORDER BY RGSN_TS DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT m101.* , CAST(m101.RGSN_TS AS TIMESTAMP) AS CAST_RGSN_TS , CAST(m101.SYS_LSMD_TS AS TIMESTAMP) AS CAST_SYS_LSMD_TS
, m107.BSUN_NM , m107.BSUN_ZPCD , m107.BSUN_ADR , m107.BSUN_DTL_ADR
FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT m101_info.*, ROWNUM AS rnum FROM TB_BOX_IVT101M m101_info
INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(RGSN_TS) AS RGSN_TS, INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO, USIS_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT101M GROUP BY INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO, USIS_ID ) m101_usis_rcnt ON ( m101_info.INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO = m101_usis_rcnt.INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO AND m101_info.USIS_ID = m101_usis_rcnt.USIS_ID AND m101_info.RGSN_TS = m101_usis_rcnt.RGSN_TS ) ) WHERE 1=1
AND (#{startRange} <= rnum AND rnum <= #{endRange})
) m101
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT m107_info.* FROM TB_BOX_IVT107M m107_info
INNER JOIN ( SELECT MIN(BSUN_ADR_SRN) AS BSUN_ADR_SRN, INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO, USIS_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT107M WHERE PRCP_BSUN_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO, USIS_ID ) m107_main ON ( m107_info.INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO = m107_main.INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO AND m107_info.USIS_ID = m107_main.USIS_ID AND m107_info.BSUN_ADR_SRN = m107_main.BSUN_ADR_SRN ) ) m107 ON (m101.INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO = m107.INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO AND m101.USIS_ID = m107.USIS_ID)
SELECT * FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
SELECT * FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_IVFL_R WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
SELECT * FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_TCHN_R WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT NVL(BSIN_PGRS_RT, 0) + NVL(PRMR_ORDV_PGRS_RT, 0) + NVL(PRMR_HMRS_PGRS_RT, 0) + NVL(STCH_PSST_PGRS_RT, 0) + NVL(FNAM_PGRS_RT, 0) + NVL(PRDT_TCHN_INFO_PGRS_RT, 0) + NVL(OTCM_PLAN_INFO_PGRS_RT, 0) AS PROGRESS , AMNN_TS AS LAST_MODIFIED_DATE , AMNN_TS AS LAST_MODIFIED_TIMESTAMP FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_PGRS_RT_D WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
SELECT * FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
SELECT * FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_P_PRDT_D WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
SELECT * FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_B_BSIN_M WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
SELECT * FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_S_STCH_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
SELECT * FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_B_INVM_D WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT RGSN_SRN , INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO , USIS_ID , STCH_NM , STCH_BIRT_YMD , HLST_CNT , RGSR_ID , RGSN_TS , SYS_LSMD_ID , SYS_LSMD_TS , CAST(RGSN_TS AS TIMESTAMP) AS CAST_RGSN_TS , CAST(SYS_LSMD_TS AS TIMESTAMP) AS CAST_SYS_LSMD_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT102M WHERE INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO = #{invmAplcMngmNo} AND USIS_ID = #{usisId}

SELECT RGSN_SRN , USIS_ID , INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO , INVM_YMD , INVM_INTT_NM , INVM_AMT , ETVL_AMT , INVM_STG_ID , RGSR_ID , RGSN_TS , SYS_LSMD_ID , SYS_LSMD_TS , CAST(RGSN_TS AS TIMESTAMP) AS CAST_RGSN_TS , CAST(SYS_LSMD_TS AS TIMESTAMP) AS CAST_SYS_LSMD_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT103M WHERE INVM_APLC_MNGM_NO = #{invmAplcMngmNo} AND USIS_ID = #{usisId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BOX_IVT_SIMP_DOC_L ( UTLINSTT_ID , SIMP_DOC_RGSN_ID , DEL_YN , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS ) SELECT m201.USIS_ID , m201.SCPG_RQST_NO , 'N' , m201.RGSR_ID , CAST(m201.RGSN_TS AS TIMESTAMP) , m201.SYS_LSMD_ID , CAST(m201.SYS_LSMD_TS AS TIMESTAMP) FROM TB_BOX_IVT201M m201 LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_SIMP_DOC_L tbisdl ON (m201.USIS_ID = tbisdl.UTLINSTT_ID AND m201.SCPG_RQST_NO = tbisdl.SIMP_DOC_RGSN_ID) WHERE tbisdl.SIMP_DOC_RGSN_ID IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT ANNC_DAT_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M WHERE ANNC_DAT_FILE_ID IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT ADDT_DOC_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M WHERE ADDT_DOC_FILE_ID IS NOT NULL
SELECT PRDT_IMG_FILE_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_PRDT_L WHERE PRDT_IMG_FILE_ID IS NOT NULL
SELECT INVM_ENPR_LGTY_IMG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PRTF_L WHERE INVM_ENPR_LGTY_IMG_ID IS NOT NULL
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_TRCT_R WHERE TOBE_INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID NOT IN ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M )
DELETE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_TRCT_R WHERE TOBE_INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M SET DEL_YN = 'N' , AMNN_USER_ID = #{amnnUserId} , AMNN_TS = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId}
